name: Generate Random Float Value
short_description: Generates a random floating-point number within a specified range (inclusive), rounded to two decimal places.

inputs.name: low
inputs.description: The lower bound of the desired range (inclusive).

inputs.name: high
inputs.description: The upper bound of the desired range (inclusive).

name: DeFi Staking Annual Reward
short_description: Calculates the annual reward in USD for a given staked amount in a DeFi staking pool with a specified Annual Percentage Yield (APY).

inputs.name: staked_amount
inputs.description: The initial amount of cryptocurrency or token staked in the DeFi pool.

inputs.name: apy
inputs.description: The Annual Percentage Yield (APY) of the staking pool, expressed as a percentage (e.g., 10 for 10%).

name: Decentralized Exchange Swap Fee
short_description: Calculates the fee incurred during a token swap on a decentralized exchange based on the total swap amount and a percentage fee.

inputs.name: swap_amount
inputs.description: The total value of tokens being swapped in USD.

inputs.name: fee_percent
inputs.description: The percentage fee charged for the swap (e.g., 0.3 for 0.3%).

name: Liquidity Pool Reward
short_description: Calculates the reward a liquidity provider receives from a pool's total fees, based on their percentage share.

inputs.name: total_fees
inputs.description: Total fees generated by the liquidity pool over a period.

inputs.name: provider_share
inputs.description: The liquidity provider's share of the total fees, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.15 for 15%).

name: Yield Farming ROI (Duration Adjusted)
short_description: Calculates the total return on investment (ROI) for a yield farming position, adjusted for the actual duration of the investment.

inputs.name: initial_investment
inputs.description: The initial capital invested in the yield farming protocol.

inputs.name: roi_annual_pct
inputs.description: The annualized Return on Investment (ROI) as a percentage.

inputs.name: duration_months
inputs.description: The total duration of the investment in months.

name: DeFi Portfolio: Multi-Factor Impact
short_description: Calculates the net impact on a DeFi portfolio's value considering staking yield and sensitivity to swap fee changes.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Current total value of the DeFi portfolio in USD.

inputs.name: staking_percentage
inputs.description: Percentage of the portfolio allocated to staking (as a decimal, e.g., 0.3 for 30%).

inputs.name: swap_fee_sensitivity
inputs.description: Portfolio's sensitivity to changes in swap fees (as a percentage, e.g., 2 for 2%).

inputs.name: yield_factor
inputs.description: Effective percentage boost from yield farming (e.g., 10 for 10%).
